message:
✨ add TypeScript & ESLint CI check for PRs (#1509)

Adds a GitHub Actions workflow that runs tsc --noEmit and next lint
on every PR touching src/ or config files. This catches type errors
and unused imports that currently only fail during Netlify production
builds — after code is already merged to main.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,44 @@
+name: TypeScript & Lint Check
+
+on:
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - "src/**"
+      - "*.ts"
+      - "*.tsx"
+      - "tsconfig.json"
+      - "package.json"
+      - ".eslintrc*"
+      - "next.config.*"
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - "src/**"
+      - "*.ts"
+      - "*.tsx"
+      - "tsconfig.json"
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  typecheck:
+    name: TypeScript & ESLint
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: "20"
+          cache: "npm"
+
+      - name: Install dependencies
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: TypeScript type check
+        run: npm run type-check
+
+      - name: ESLint
+        run: npm run lint
